case_title: HANAI IBRAHIM VS. WALDA COREA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WALDA COREA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LAURA VILLANUEVA. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY IBRAHIM, HANAI AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WALDA COREA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM, HANAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WALDA COREA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
